case_title: RADWA MOUSTAFA VS. AMY KIN SUN TSENG ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOUSTAFA, RADWA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOUSTAFA, RADWA AS TO DEFENDANT TSENG, AMY KIN SUN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-07-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-07-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMY KIN SUN TSENG WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2015 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOUSTAFA, RADWA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TSENG, AMY KIN SUN TSENG, KENNY KIN SUN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
